prompt: Please create a commercial advertising poster for an ultra-thin tactile simulator device. Brand Name: Anima Product Name: Lene [Visual Concept] The model is reaching out into empty space, gesturing as if stroking the "soft fur of a cat." The model is an urban, sophisticated woman. Close up on her expression as she gently closes her eyes, feeling truly at peace from the warmth transmitted through her fingertips. [Device Design] The model's hand is equipped with an ultra-thin, translucent smart glove (smart skin) that integrates with the skin. The material is like matte silicone, with subtle gold circuits resembling a nervous system faintly visible inside. [Effects and Composition] Place the hand movements and expression in more than 60% of the screen so that the fingertips are the main focus. In the space the fingertips are touching, a hologram of "soft cat fur" drawn with light particles is faintly rising. Emphasize the contrast in texture as if there is a real entity there (inorganic device vs. soft light fur). [Lighting/Atmosphere] Soft, warm natural light like a Sunday morning. A clean, minimalist background. A quiet, emotional atmosphere like the cover of a high-end lifestyle magazine. [Text Placement] Japanese Catchphrase: "Your fingertips become the gentlest place in the world. " Elegantly placed at the top or center-left in a thin modern Mincho font. The brand name "Anima" and product name "Lene" are placed modestly but with a sense of luxury in a clean sans-serif font at the bottom right. Without using real brands or people, express a world where cutting-edge technology is put into practical use as 'kindness'.
